name: MMC Recent Consoles
categoryDescription: Application-specific artifacts — Office document activity, Outlook profiles, media player history, and communication tools.
description: Microsoft Management Console recently opened .msc console files.
forensic_value: Reveals which MMC snap-ins an attacker opened — e.g., lusrmgr.msc (local users), compmgmt.msc, gpedit.msc. Useful for establishing attacker reconnaissance and privilege escalation activity.
